package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_io_operations_temporary_file_for_stream_transform: Layer: I/O operations. Flag temporary files used only to bridge streaming transformations.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule553NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario553Negative(records []Rule553NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
